speaker: MATT
raw_text: I was hoping it would bother you for the rest of the game. So, that being the case, we're jumping right into battle at the top of this game in the center of this beach-side cavern. Roll initiative, everybody.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right in. We have a good number of the party that is still out in the boat that is being towed by Keyleth, currently in shark form.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm in a boat. I'm in a motherfucking boat.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right there. So in the cavern, I believe we had Vax, we had Scanlan. Tiberius and Vex on the flying carpet and are making their way down. You scouted ahead and began to check the interior before this happened. So, these creatures are now rising up off the ground, looking insidious in their expression, all glaring at you, as you're the most apparently-nearby individual. What are you doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You have fuzz in your hair.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No you got it. It's gone.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Get down into frame! Lower into frame. Pull them down.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ladies and gentlemen, we have a bunch of shirts to sell tonight.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We should not be hanging out in this room right now. Can I try to get a better look at what I saw?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You see, best you can, and you guys follow her eyeline. You look up, and you see what first looks like it's part of the cavern ceiling. It has this weird texture. It looks almost like the smooth rock that the interior of the cavern comes off as. However, as you see it shift and move, it looks almost like a portion of it is moving and slowly crawling, and it looks like there's a red gleaming eye, and then two, and something drops down from the side, almost like a tail that seems to dangle for a second. At which point, it detaches. (fwoosh) Opens up almost like a giant ray, with a screeching mouth that (screeches) screams at you. It lands down in the center of the room.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I rolled a nine for medicine, just B-T-W. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How's my foot doing these days?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Your foot is still healing, but unfortunately, based on the medicine roll, it is getting better but not enough to complete the process of you getting all your toes back.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I saw that thing out of the corner of my eye and was just distracted.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's a big ray of death. I don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It does look like a flying manta ray.
